publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate with access to structured psychotherapy; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Specialist psychiatric diagnosis and crisis pathways common
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: DBT and other structured psychotherapies; crisis planning; targeted pharmacotherapy for symptom domains
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access variability and high service demand
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Availability of structured psychotherapy programs in many member states
